NOTE: This depressive disorders condition definition is slightly different than the CCW depression 
condition; CMS specified this depressive affective disorder condition to enhance research of the 
Medicare-Medicaid dually enrolled population. 

You can find more detailed information on the criteria on the CCW website: 
https://www.ccwdata.org/web/guest/condition-categories
